news.title: US Stock Market: Dollar rally gains support as global pension funds unwind FX hedges, easing pressure on greenback
news.description: Major pension funds are reducing currency hedges, which supports the U.S. dollar's rally. This shift occurs as hedging costs rise due to widening U.S. interest rate differentials. news.title: Kaiser Reef lifts gold production 8% from Tassie and Vic mines
news.description: Kaiser Reef has poured 6000 ounces of gold across Henty and Maldon this quarter and reaffirmed its 32,000-ounce guidance for 2027, with $37.2M in the bank.

news.title: Trump reinstates Iran port blockade and imposes 20% charge on cargo passing through Hormuz
news.description: Trump says the US will become the "guardian" of the Strait of Hormuz and will charge ships for using it. Iran earlier warned the US not to "interfere" in the strait's "management".
